task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., s3://my-bucket/path/to/object) and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies the function name, runtime (Python 3.11), timeout (60 seconds), and memory size (256 MB)
Write a Python function that takes an AWS region code as input and returns True if it's a valid AWS region, False otherwise. Use a hardcoded list of common regions
